channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Exiled Cuban artist Otero Alcantara has arrived in US, Rubio confirms
item.description: Otero Alcantara is part of the San Isidro Movement, which has long been the target of Cuban repression.

item.title: A giant cake for Venezuelan quake child survivors as death toll passes 5000
item.description: Volunteers made a giant cake to cheer up around 3,000 Venezuelan children displaced by last month's powerful twin quakes

item.title: Netanyahu declares support for Argentina ahead of World Cup final
item.description: Argentina’s ambassador to Israel has presented Benjamin Netanyahu with a football jersey ahead of the World Cup final.

item.title: Iran war live: US launches new strikes; Trump mourns killed soldiers
item.description: US president says death of soldiers in Jordan a 'sad thing' as US forces attack Iran for the eighth consecutive night.

item.title: Saka hat-trick helps England down France to win World Cup 2026 Bronze Final
item.description: Kylian Mbappe scores twice for France to hit World Cup record, but England win 6-4 in third-place playoff final.

item.title: Kylian Mbappe breaks all-time World Cup scoring record with 22nd goal
item.description: Mbappe is back on track to defend his Golden Boot title, which he and Messi have traded between themselves throughout the tournament.

item.title: World Cup final tickets near $2.3m mark on FIFA’s resale platform
item.description: While no tickets are available on FIFA's sales platform, they are being resold for sky-high prices on resale sites.

item.title: Cockroach Party protest intensifies after Wangchuk forcibly hospitalised
item.description: Protest by India's Cockroach Janta Party has intensified after activist Sonam Wangchuk was forcibly hospitalised.

item.title: Latin America unites to cheer against Argentina in FIFA World Cup final
item.description: Fans from Mexico to Brazil unite to cheer Yamal's Spain against Argentina and Messi, whom they call 'FIFA’s golden boy'.

item.title: Palestinian teenage footballer dies a week after Israeli settler attack
item.description: A week after he was shot in his West Bank village, Fadi al-Nassan's death comes amid a surge in settler violence.

item.title: Drone video shows scale of major wildfire in northern Spain
item.description: Drone video shows the scale of a major wildfire in northern Spain where more than 150 square kilometres have burned

item.title: Why has the ‘ceasefire’ in Gaza failed to stop Israel’s attacks?
item.description: Palestinians who have endured Israel's genocidal war are still being targeted.

item.title: All to know about Canadian wildfire smoke, air quality and World Cup final
item.description: A thunderstorm rolled through the region causing disruption, and a haze raised air quality concerns in New York City.

item.title: Thousands rally in London in support of Gaza, demand new PM take action
item.description: Demonstrators call on Andy Burnham to impose arms embargo on Israel and pressure its government to end genocide.

item.title: Iran supreme leader warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’ if US attacks continue
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei says Trump's signature is 'worthless' and that 'bullying' is a core element of US foreign policy.

item.title: Israeli attacks on residential areas in Gaza kill eight
item.description: Attacks hit neighbourhoods in Gaza City far beyond the line Israeli forces are meant to hold under the ceasefire.

item.title: New York’s Mamdani says looking into Netanyahu arrest during city visit
item.description: Mamdani had pledged to arrest Netanyahu during campaign for mayor and says he is consulting city's legal advisers.

item.title: Damage visible at Iran bridges and water plant after US attacks
item.description: US strikes damaged bridges and a water desalination plant in Iran after a seventh straight night of attacks.

item.title: US military says two service members killed in Iranian strike in Jordan
item.description: US and Iran have stepped up attacks in the last week, prompting alarm about return to full-scale war across the region.

item.title: England 6-4 France: FIFA World Cup 2026 – as it happened
item.description: All the updates from our live text commentary stream coverage of the Bronze Final, which saw Saka score a hat-trick.

item.title: Lebanon’s Aoun to meet Trump in Washington to discuss Israel talks
item.description: The Lebanese and US presidents are expected to discuss the ceasefire, southern Lebanon, and Israel’s withdrawal.

item.title: UK’s Josh Kerr smashes longstanding world mile record in London
item.description: Kerr ran a 3:42.66 mile at the London Diamond League, smashing Hicham El Guerrouj’s world record by 0.47 seconds.

item.title: What to expect after the US reimposes naval blockade on Iran’s ports?
item.description: Pressure is expected to build on the Iranian public, as well as global energy markets due to the US blockade.

item.title: Armed groups attack Malian military convoy in Gao region
item.description: Mali says counterattack under way as rebels claim they inflicted 'human losses' and 'material damage' on troops.

item.title: Belgium bans imports from Israeli settlements in occupied Palestine
item.description: The move comes as EU foreign ministers remain deadlocked over a bloc-wide ban on illegal settlement trade.
